idea-plugin.name: GitHub Unified UI Theme
idea-plugin.description: A low-contrast blue-black UI theme with a modified Catppuccin Mocha editor color scheme. Designed for the Islands/New UI in IntelliJ Platform 2026.2.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.4

  • Unified UI surfaces within a blue-black color family.
  • Reduced border and editor-guide contrast.
  • Preserved Catppuccin Mocha syntax foreground colors.
